name: Dimitris Papantzikos
headline: ML Engineer applying AI to healthcare and energy
description: Machine Learning Engineer with hands-on experience in building ML pipelines, automating documentation with LLMs, and deploying production systems. Focused on delivering real-world impact through AI.

bio: ML engineer focused on applying AI to practical problems in healthcare and energy. I break work down to first principles and have hands-on experience across the lifecycle: building ML pipelines, automating documentation with LLMs, and deploying production systems.
Currently pursuing an M.Sc. in Mathematical Modelling and Computation at DTU; motivated by projects where AI delivers real and visible impact, (in)directly enhancing people's lives.
skills: Google Cloud (Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Cloud Build)
